headline: Mega deals reach record high and propel surge in deal value, according to WTW
summary: Global M&A shrugs off high volatility and geopolitical noise, as the value of completed deals soar to five-year high of $438 billion – an increase of 155% in 12 monthsLONDON, April 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- M&A transactions of $10 billion or more have hit an all-time record in the first three months of 2026, according to research on completed deals from WTW’s Quarterly Deal Performance Monitor (QDPM).
